zh.London St Edmund the King with St Nichol: 英國英格蘭倫敦聖 埃德蒙 馮 金 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 阿可斯
zh.Montgomeryshire Infirmary, Newtown, Powy: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾紐托
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jocamine Broghe於1572年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 埃德蒙 馮 金 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 阿可斯時，她的父親Broghe30歲，母親Mrs Broghe26歲。她於1575年1月23日與John Thomas在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 埃德蒙 馮 金 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 阿可斯結婚。她去世於1616年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: Broghe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: topographic name derived from broc, an Old Occitan word (of ultimate Gaulish origin; see 2 below) denoting a ‘rocky spur’ or ‘place with a spiny vegetation’ (compare Dubroc 1).
metonymic occupational name from an Old French and Old Occitan derivative of Latin broccum (from Gaulish broccos), denoting different pointed objects such as needle and spit.

variants.name: Brochu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Aime, Fernand, Emile, Laurent, Marcel, Cecile, Donat, Gaetan, Gilles, Jacques.
French: occupational name from an Old French derivative of Latin broccum, denoting different pointed objects such as needle and spit (compare Broche ).
History: Jean Brochu from Montaigu in Vendée, France, married Nicole Saulnier in Sainte-Famille, Île d'Orléans, QC, in 1669.

variants.name: Dubroc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camile, Florien, Gaston, Pierre.

topographic name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, from broc, an Old Occitan word denoting a ‘rocky spur’ or ‘place with a spiny vegetation’ (see Broche ), or a habitational name for someone from Le Broc, the name of several places in various parts of France, named with this word.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Jocamine Broghe was born in 1572, in St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Broghe, was 30 and her mother, Mrs Broghe, was 26. She married John Thomas on 23 January 1575, in St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, London, England, United Kingdom. She died in 1616, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 44.

Elle a épousé John Thomas le 23 janvier 1575, à St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1616, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Jocamine Broghe(이)가 1572년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 에드먼드 테 킨그 위스 스트 닉홀아스 악스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Broghe(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Broghe(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1575년 1월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 에드먼드 테 킨그 위스 스트 닉홀아스 악스에서 John Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1616년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.London St Edmund the King with St Nichol: ст эдмунд т кинг вит ст ничолас акунс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jocamine Broghe родилась в 1572 г. в местности ст эдмунд т кинг вит ст ничолас акунс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Broghe было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Broghe, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Thomas 23 января 1575 г. в местности ст эдмунд т кинг вит ст ничолас акунс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1616 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.
